message:
Update dependencies and fix contextual bandits and inference ledger

- Refresh Cargo.lock (remove 168 unused dependency entries)
- Fix contextual_bandits.rs decision logic for updated API
- Fix inference/ledger.rs ledger tracking for updated types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
